calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Wanting-gradient navigation fix (EXQ-259 fix): SD-015, MECH-216, SD-012
items.notes: Fixes EXQ-259 FAIL: enables schema_wanting_enabled=True, use_resource_proximity_head=True, drive_weight=2.0. Three-phase training (P0 warmup, P1 wanting active, P2 eval). Paper gate experiment.

items.title: MECH-163 hippocampal goal-conditioned navigation: paper gate
items.notes: Tests E3Config.goal_weight in score_trajectory() for goal-conditioned navigation. GOAL_CONDITIONED vs GOAL_ABLATED. Paper gate primary criterion: benefit_ratio >= 1.3x.

items.title: MECH-216 genuinely predictive wanting: future-target supervision + resource visibility attenuation
items.notes: Major redesign of EXQ-263b. EXQ-263b trained on CURRENT resource_proximity -- just reactive detection. This redesign: (1) supervision target = binary future_resource_encounter within next 10 steps (episode-level replay on cached E1 LSTM hidden states), (2) resource_obs_scale=0.3 attenuates direct resource gradient in observation only -- landmark B becomes dominant predictive cue, (3) acceptance criteria directly test predictive vs reactive: primary metric is corr(schema_salience, future_target) vs corr(schema_salience, current_resource_prox). Two conditions: PREDICTIVE_CUE_ON (n_landmarks_b=2, resource bias=0.8) vs PREDICTIVE_CUE_ABLATED (no landmarks). 12x12 grid, 1 hazard (hazard_harm=0.1), 2 resources with respawn. P1 uses random actions (no CEM) to equalise condition survival and eliminate ~96 E2 rollouts/step overhead. PASS requires: C1 CUE_ON future_target_corr>0.10, C2 CUE_ON>ABLATED, C3 future_target_corr>resource_prox_corr (not reactive).

items.title: SD-013 contrastive counterfactual retest: interventional_fraction=0.5 (EXQ-330 fix)
items.notes: EXQ-330 FAIL: cf_gap_ratio=1.29-1.49x (threshold 2.0). Fix: interventional_fraction raised from 0.3 to 0.5 (50% of P1 steps apply margin loss vs 30%). Stronger threshold C2=2.0 to confirm genuine improvement. Two conditions: CONTRASTIVE (interventional_fraction=0.5) vs OBSERVATIONAL. Same architecture and environment as EXQ-330. SD-013 primary; ARC-033 C1 integrity check.

items.title: ARC-033/SD-003/SD-013 interventional vs observational training comparison
items.notes: SD-003/ARC-033 evidence_quality_note caveat: EXQ-329 used observational training only; interventional training (Scholkopf 2021) needed for unbiased causal_sig in confounded states. This experiment directly addresses that caveat. INTERVENTIONAL (use_interventional=True, frac=0.5) vs OBSERVATIONAL (MSE-only) on matched seeds. Compares cf_gap_ratio, forward_r2, attribution_sign_correct. C3 (lift>=1.2x) is SD-013 specific criterion. Per-claim: ARC-033=C1, SD-003=C2, SD-013=C3.

items.title: SD-015 ResourceEncoder z_goal seeding fix: use_resource_encoder wiring corrected
items.notes: Bug fix from EXQ-322 (n_cosine_samples=0 in all seeds). Root cause: make_config() passed latent=<LatentStackConfig> to from_dims() which has no 'latent' parameter -- silently ignored via **kwargs. use_resource_encoder was never True. ResourceEncoder never built. z_resource always None. Fix: set cfg.latent.use_resource_encoder=True directly after from_dims(). Also fixed goal seeding to use harm_signal from env.step() (raw contact benefit) instead of pre-step EMA obs_body[11] (~0 at contact time). Measurement gate changed to is_active() check.

items.title: MECH-112 z_goal structured latent fix: correct seeding signal + drive ablation threshold
items.notes: Two bugs fixed from EXQ-328. Bug 1: seeded z_goal from obs_body[11] (benefit_exposure EMA before env.step). EMA near 0 at contact time -> effective_benefit<threshold -> seeding never fired. Fix: use raw harm_signal from env.step() on resource contact (0.5+ >> threshold). Bug 2: with benefit_threshold=0.1 and resource_benefit=0.5, DRIVE_ABLATED (drive_weight=0) also seeds z_goal since 0.5>0.1, making C3 unmeasurable. Fix: DRIVE_ABLATED uses benefit_threshold=0.6, above raw contact benefit (0.5) but below amplified DRIVE_ACTIVE effective_benefit (~0.8+ at drive_level=0.3). Also added MIN_WINDOW_STEPS guard and increased DRY_RUN_STEPS.

items.title: MECH-090 bistable gate retest: E2 world-forward training added (EXQ-321 fix)
items.notes: EXQ-321 FAIL root cause: training loop never called E2 world_forward or update_running_variance(). running_variance frozen at 0.50, never dropped below commitment_threshold=0.40, committed=False throughout, total_committed_steps=0. Fix: added wf_buf (deque maxlen=2000) + wf_optimizer (E2.world_transition + world_action_encoder) + update_running_variance(wf_pred - zw1) per step; extended TRAIN_EPISODES 50->300. claim_ids reduced to [MECH-090] only -- ARC-028 tests gate release via hippocampal signal, not gate hold property. Both conditions use beta_gate_bistable=True (BISTABLE) vs False (LEGACY). C3: total_committed_steps > 0 is the prerequisite criterion.

items.title: SD-021 descending pain modulation retest: E2 world-forward training added (EXQ-325 fix)
items.notes: EXQ-325 FAIL root cause: same training loop bug as EXQ-321. No E2 world_forward training, running_variance=0.50 frozen, beta_gate never elevated, SD-021 descending modulation path never reached. Fix: added wf_buf + wf_optimizer + update_running_variance per step; extended TRAIN_EPISODES 80->300; added beta_gate_bistable=True to both conditions (needed for gate to hold once elevated). claim_ids reduced to [SD-021] only -- MECH-090 and SD-011 are prerequisites used as substrate, not the variable being tested. C3: n_committed_steps_descending >= 10. limb_damage_enabled=True (SD-022) required for causal independence between z_harm_s and z_harm_a.

items.title: MECH-104 surprise gate: discriminative support vs ablation pair (5-seed replication)
ARC-038 schema assimilation: discriminative support vs ablation pair
MECH-220 harm hub: behavioral harm-avoidance probe (hub_enabled vs hub_ablated)
MECH-073 valence geometry: discriminative support vs ablation pair
INV-049 offline consolidation necessity: sleep ablation probe
items.notes: WITH_OFFLINE vs WITHOUT_OFFLINE ablation pair. Tests whether periodic SWS+REM sleep cycles (SD-017) improve E1 ContextMemory slot_diversity and prediction quality vs waking-only training. PASS: C1 (slot_diversity WITH > WITHOUT >=2/3 seeds) AND C2 (late_pred_loss WITH < WITHOUT >=2/3 seeds). C3 (harm_rate) secondary.

items.title: MECH-230 z_goal latent structure: homeostatic drive ablation (full run)
items.notes: Full real run (not dry run). EXQ-328a confirmed correct: harm_signal seeding + benefit_threshold calibration. EXQ-328a dry runs had 0 contact events (3 eps x 120 steps too short). MECH-112 split: this tests latent z_goal structure (MECH-230), not behavioral dissociation (MECH-229).

items.title: SD-015 nav integration fix: z_resource encoder wiring + harm_signal seeding
items.notes: Fixes EXQ-326: (1) SD-015 wiring fix applied (cfg.latent.use_resource_encoder=True after from_dims); (2) pre-step EMA seeding bug fixed (use harm_signal from env.step() on ttype==resource steps). EXQ-354 proved SD-015 and nav integration work when correctly applied. Tests SD-015 navigation aspect and MECH-229 behavioral dissociation in nav context.

items.title: INV-053 depression attractor replication: 5-seed LONG_HORIZON characterisation
items.notes: 5-seed systematic replication of the depression attractor observed in EXQ-237a seed=42. LONG_HORIZON (8x8, 3 hazards, 1 resource, hazard_harm=0.02, 150 steps/ep). HABIT vs PLANNED per seed. PASS: >=4/5 seeds show goal_norm<0.10 AND behavioral_equivalence<0.02. No new architecture; parameter extension of EXQ-237a. Run before MECH-186/187/188 experiments.

items.title: MECH-231 E2 short-horizon efference-copy discriminative pair
items.notes: Corrected MECH-070 direction. Criteria inverted: E2 must degrade faster than E1 across horizons (short-horizon claim). C1 PASS expected (E2 better at h=1 action-conditioned), C2/C3 PASS expected (EXQ-212 showed slope_e2 << slope_e1 -- now a PASS criterion).
